items.headline_ai: HLEND posts 10.7% annualized net return since launch, caps Q1 2026 repurchases at 5%
items.snippet: HLEND reports a 10.7% annualized total net return to shareholders since launching four years ago, citing it among the best-performing non-traded BDCs.

items.headline_ai: HLEND addresses AI disruption risk for software sector private credit borrowers
items.snippet: HLEND issues a software Q&A addressing how AI-driven valuation compression in public software equities affects private credit exposures.

items.headline_ai: BlackRock completes acquisition of HPS Investment Partners, creating ~$220B private credit franchise
items.snippet: BlackRock closes its acquisition of HPS Investment Partners on July 1, 2025, creating an integrated private credit franchise with approximately $220B in client assets.

items.headline_ai: BlackRock announces $148B HPS Investment Partners acquisition to create $220B private credit platform
items.snippet: BlackRock announces a deal to acquire HPS Investment Partners with ~$148B in client assets, expected to increase private markets fee-paying AUM by ~40%.

items.headline_ai: HLEND raises monthly base distribution to $0.16/share, adds $0.021 supplemental
items.snippet: HLEND raises its monthly base distribution to $0.1600/share from $0.1464 and introduces a $0.021/share monthly supplemental, representing a 9.1% total annualized yield for Class I

items.headline_ai: HLEND breaks escrow with $500M in net equity, launches with $1.2B in investable capital
items.snippet: HLEND breaks escrow with ~$500M in net equity proceeds and ~$1.2B in investable capital at launch, with additional months of subscription capacity already in place.
